hero.desc: BetaCare dey digitize your medical history so e go follow you anywhere you go — for different hospitals, cities, and all over Naija. No more missing case notes. No more starting afresh.

problem.desc: Hospitals like UCH still dey use paper write patient history. Dis thing dey cause big wahala for people life.

problems.title: Paper records dey loss
problems.description: Many people dey reach hospital make dem find say dem case notes don missing — e mean say dem go start from scratch.

problems.title: Damage no get reverse
problems.description: Fire, flood, and normal wear and tear dey destroy medical history. No backup, no recovery, no continuation.

problems.title: No connection between hospitals
problems.description: Different hospitals no know wetin happen before — e dey make dem do double tests and cause danger.

features.title: Everything you need, inside one place
features.desc: We build am for Nigerian healthcare — e dey reliable, secure, and e easy to use no be small.

list.label: Main Thing
list.title: Digital Medical Records
list.desc: Secure cloud place to keep all your medical history — sickness, medicine, lab result, and doctor note.
points: E dey follow Nigeria data law
E keep your record for life

list.label: Main Thing
list.title: Naija-Friendly Dashboard
list.desc: BetaCare dey follow Nigerians yafun-yafun for WhatsApp and SMS. No app download. Just wetin dem already know.
points: SMS for place wey network bad

list.label: AI Power
list.title: Smart Health Agent
list.desc: Our AI go study your health matter — e monitor your drug, remind you for hospital day, and tell you if danger dey.

howItWorks.title: E easy for everybody
howItWorks.desc: Patient, doctor, or hospital — to start no go pass 2 minutes.

steps.title: Open account
steps.desc: Register with your name, number, and email sharply.

steps.title: Arrange your health profile
steps.desc: Answer small questions and import your old records through WhatsApp.

steps.title: See records anywhere
steps.desc: Check your history, share am with doctor safely, get AI health alerts.

steps.title: Register & enter details
steps.desc: Sign up with full name, email, and MDCN licence number.

steps.title: Prove your identity
steps.desc: Email OTP, then confirm your face with Smile Identity.

steps.title: Check patient history
steps.desc: If dem gree, view records, update notes, check patient waka.

steps.title: Apply to join
steps.desc: Submit hospital details and CAC for us to review.

steps.title: Set up your system
steps.desc: Arrange how patients go move, departments, and doctor accounts.

steps.title: Start work
steps.desc: Begin record visits, manage records digital, and work together.

trust.title: We built am on trust
trust.desc: Security and privacy no be play for us, na the main foundation.

pillars.title: End-to-End Encrypted
pillars.desc: Your health data safe well well. Nobody fit read am without your permission.

pillars.title: NDPR Compliant
pillars.desc: We dey follow Nigeria Data Protection Regulation and world health standard.

pillars.title: Patient First
pillars.desc: Na you decide who go see your records. You go see everybody wey check am.

pillars.title: Always Available
pillars.desc: Your records dey even if network fail via WhatsApp and SMS. E no dey ever crash.

hospital.desc: Make your clinical team get instant access to patient history. Reduce paper work, improve care.
benefits: Instant access to patient records when dem need am
Reduce doctor time and double tests
E dey follow Nigerian health laws
Good support team ready for you 24/7

faq.title: Questions people dey ask
faq.desc: Everything you need to know about BetaCare. You no see your answer?

items.a: Yes. BetaCare na totally free for patients. Na hospitals dey pay us subscription. Patient no go ever pay shishi.

items.q: How I go see my records?
items.a: You fit see your records via web dashboard, WhatsApp, or SMS. No need to download app. Register once and your records dey with you anywhere.
Confirm. All data dey encrypted and store for NDPR servers. We no go ever sell your data. You go see who access your records.
We dey work with hospitals for Lagos, Abuja, and Port Harcourt. Any hospital fit join us through our portal — our network dey grow everyday.
Doctors go do three things: email OTP, MDCN licence check, and face verification via Smile Identity. Na only real doctors fit enter.

items.q: I fit use BetaCare without smartphone?
items.a: Yes. BetaCare works with SMS for people without smartphone or internet. Any phone with SIM card and small airtime go work.

items.q: Wetin go happen to my records if I change hospital?
items.a: Your records na your own, no be hospital own. If you visit new hospital, you go give dem permission to see your BetaCare profile — your full history go show sharp sharp.

items.q: How the AI health agent dey work?
items.a: The AI go check your records and how you dey use our app. E go remind you for medicine and appointment, tell you if danger dey, and answer simple health questions on WhatsApp.

cta.title: Your health story deserve better keeping
cta.desc: Join Nigerians wey don take control of their health records. Sign up free — no credit card, no app download.

footer.desc: We dey put Nigeria healthcare records on internet, one person at a time.
